component.name: VR Hotspot
component.summary: Prototype control shell for a host-installed VRhotspot daemon

description.p: VR Hotspot is an early Flatpak app shell for the separately installed VRhotspot daemon. This prototype launches an offline, unpaired status window and does not provide hotspot lifecycle or configuration controls.
The privileged daemon and its host installer remain separate from this unprivileged application.
First rough installable and testable Flatpak shell prototype.
